entities.name: CLIMATE ANALOGUE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to assess climate-induced risks and adaptation options by comparing current sites with future climate analogues

entities.name: CLIMATE-INDUCED RISKS
entities.description: Risks to smallholder farmers resulting from climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION OPTIONS
entities.description: Strategies and choices available to farmers to adapt to climate change

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating on small plots of land

entities.name: GENDER PERSPECTIVE
entities.description: An analytical approach that considers the different roles and needs of men and women

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The total amount of precipitation in a year

entities.name: MEAN ANNUAL TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The average temperature over a year

entities.name: CHIREDZI
entities.description: A drier climate analogue site in Zimbabwe

entities.name: MATOBO
entities.description: A site in Zimbabwe represented by the Chiredzi analogue

entities.name: KADOMA
entities.description: A wetter climate analogue site in Zimbabwe

entities.name: MAZOWE/GOROMONZI
entities.description: A site in Zimbabwe represented by the Kadoma analogue

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Techniques used by farmers to manage their crops

entities.name: GENDER ISSUES
entities.description: Social and economic disparities and roles based on gender

entities.name: SMALL GRAINS
entities.description: Crops such as sorghum or millet grown in drier areas

entities.name: LABOUR
entities.description: Human effort required for the production and processing of crops

entities.name: MALE LABOUR MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of men away from the farm for work

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Techniques to conserve soil and water for agriculture

entities.name: DRAFT POWER
entities.description: Animal power used for agricultural tasks

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL ASSETS
entities.description: Physical resources and tools used in farming

entities.name: SOCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: Networks of relationships and social resources

entities.name: FINANCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: Monetary resources available to households
